SELECT COALESCE(SUM(dd.total_pesificado), 0) AS total_uyu,

FROM operaciones

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(o.total_pesificado), 0) AS total_uyu, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_dolarizado), 0) AS total_usd
        FROM operaciones o
        WHERE o.tipo_operacion = 'DISTRIBUCION' AND o.deleted_at IS NULL
        AND DATE_TRUNC('month', o.fecha) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)

SELECT
            COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0)
            - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS resultado_uyu,
            COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0)
            - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS resultado_usd
        FROM operaciones o
        WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL AND o.tipo_operacion IN ('INGRESO', 'GASTO')
        AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha) = 2025

SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) AS ingresos,
    SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) AS gastos,
    SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) -
    SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) AS resultado_neto,
    CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) > 0
        THEN ROUND(
            (SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) -
             SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 /
            SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 2)
        ELSE 0
    END AS rentabilidad_pct
FROM operaciones
WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
  AND tipo_operacion IN ('INGRESO', 'GASTO')
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)

WITH datos AS (
    SELECT
        a.nombre AS area,
        SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) AS ingresos,
        SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) AS gastos
    FROM operaciones o
    INNER JOIN areas a ON o.area_id = a.id
    WHERE o.tipo_operacion IN ('INGRESO', 'GASTO')
      AND o.deleted_at IS NULL
      AND a.nombre != 'Otros Gastos'
    GROUP BY a.nombre
)
SELECT area, ingresos, gastos, ingresos - gastos AS resultado,
    CASE WHEN ingresos > 0 THEN ROUND((ingresos - gastos) * 100.0 / ingresos, 2) ELSE 0 END AS rentabilidad_pct
FROM datos
ORDER BY rentabilidad_pct DESC
LIMIT 1

WITH 
-- SECCIÓN 1: TOTALES GENERALES
totales AS (
    SELECT 
        '01_TOTALES' AS seccion,
        'GENERAL' AS dimension,
        '2025' AS periodo,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'RETIRO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS retiros_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'RETIRO' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS retiros_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'DISTRIBUCION' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS distribuciones_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'DISTRIBUCION' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS distribuciones_usd,
        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM operaciones 
    WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) = 2025
),

-- SECCIÓN 2: POR ÁREA
por_area AS (
    SELECT 
        '02_POR_AREA' AS seccion,
        a.nombre AS dimension,
        '2025' AS periodo,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS retiros_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS retiros_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_usd,
        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM operaciones o
    JOIN areas a ON a.id = o.area_id
    WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha) = 2025
    GROUP BY a.nombre
),

-- SECCIÓN 3: POR LOCALIDAD
por_localidad AS (
    SELECT 
        '03_POR_LOCALIDAD' AS seccion,
        localidad::TEXT AS dimension,
        '2025' AS periodo,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'RETIRO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS retiros_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'RETIRO' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS retiros_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_usd,
        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM operaciones 
    WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) = 2025
    GROUP BY localidad
),

-- SECCIÓN 4: POR MES
por_mes AS (
    SELECT 
        '04_POR_MES' AS seccion,
        TO_CHAR(fecha, 'MM-Mon') AS dimension,
        '2025' AS periodo,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'RETIRO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS retiros_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'RETIRO' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS retiros_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'DISTRIBUCION' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS distribuciones_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'DISTRIBUCION' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS distribuciones_usd,
        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM operaciones 
    WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) = 2025
    GROUP BY TO_CHAR(fecha, 'MM-Mon')
),

-- SECCIÓN 5: RETIROS DE LA EMPRESA (por localidad y moneda)
retiros_empresa AS (
    SELECT 
        '05_RETIROS_EMPRESA' AS seccion,
        localidad::TEXT || ' - ' || moneda_original::TEXT AS dimension,
        '2025' AS periodo,
        0::NUMERIC AS ingresos_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS ingresos_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS gastos_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS gastos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(total_pesificado), 0) AS retiros_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(total_dolarizado), 0) AS retiros_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_usd,
        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM operaciones 
    WHERE deleted_at IS NULL 
    AND tipo_operacion = 'RETIRO'
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) = 2025
    GROUP BY localidad, moneda_original
),

-- SECCIÓN 6: DISTRIBUCIONES A SOCIOS
distribuciones_socios AS (
    SELECT 
        '06_DISTRIBUCIONES_SOCIOS' AS seccion,
        s.nombre || ' (' || dd.porcentaje || '%)' AS dimension,
        '2025' AS periodo,
        0::NUMERIC AS ingresos_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS ingresos_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS gastos_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS gastos_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS retiros_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS retiros_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(dd.total_pesificado), 0) AS distribuciones_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(dd.total_dolarizado), 0) AS distribuciones_usd,
        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM distribuciones_detalle dd
    JOIN operaciones o ON o.id = dd.operacion_id
    JOIN socios s ON s.id = dd.socio_id
    WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha) = 2025
    GROUP BY s.nombre, dd.porcentaje
),

-- SECCIÓN 7: RENTABILIDAD POR ÁREA
rentabilidad_area AS (
    SELECT 
        '07_RENTABILIDAD_AREA' AS seccion,
        a.nombre || ' -> ' || 
        ROUND(
            CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) > 0
            THEN ((SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) - 
                   SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END)) /
                  SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) * 100)
            ELSE 0 END
        , 1)::TEXT || '% rentabilidad' AS dimension,
        '2025' AS periodo,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS retiros_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS retiros_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_usd,
        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM operaciones o
    JOIN areas a ON a.id = o.area_id
    WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL 
    AND a.nombre != 'Otros Gastos'
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha) = 2025
    GROUP BY a.nombre
),

-- SECCIÓN 8: TOP 10 CLIENTES
top_clientes AS (
    SELECT 
        '08_TOP_CLIENTES' AS seccion,
        COALESCE(cliente, 'Sin especificar') AS dimension,
        '2025' AS periodo,
        COALESCE(SUM(total_pesificado), 0) AS ingresos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(total_dolarizado), 0) AS ingresos_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS gastos_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS gastos_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS retiros_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS retiros_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_usd,
        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM operaciones 
    WHERE deleted_at IS NULL 
    AND tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO'
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) = 2025
    AND cliente IS NOT NULL AND cliente != ''
    GROUP BY cliente
    ORDER BY SUM(total_pesificado) DESC
    LIMIT 10
),

-- SECCIÓN 9: TOP 10 PROVEEDORES
top_proveedores AS (
    SELECT 
        '09_TOP_PROVEEDORES' AS seccion,
        COALESCE(proveedor, 'Sin especificar') AS dimension,
        '2025' AS periodo,
        0::NUMERIC AS ingresos_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS ingresos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(total_pesificado), 0) AS gastos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(total_dolarizado), 0) AS gastos_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS retiros_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS retiros_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_usd,
        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM operaciones 
    WHERE deleted_at IS NULL 
    AND tipo_operacion = 'GASTO'
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) = 2025
    AND proveedor IS NOT NULL AND proveedor != ''
    GROUP BY proveedor
    ORDER BY SUM(total_pesificado) DESC
    LIMIT 10
)

SELECT * FROM totales
UNION ALL SELECT * FROM por_area
UNION ALL SELECT * FROM por_localidad
UNION ALL SELECT * FROM por_mes
UNION ALL SELECT * FROM retiros_empresa
UNION ALL SELECT * FROM distribuciones_socios
UNION ALL SELECT * FROM rentabilidad_area
UNION ALL SELECT * FROM top_clientes

        ORDER BY resultado_uyu DESC

distribuciones_socios AS (

    GROUP BY s.nombre, dd.porcentaje, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha)
),

-- SECCIÓN 7: RENTABILIDAD POR ÁREA (área × año)
rentabilidad_area AS (
    SELECT 
        '07_RENTABILIDAD_AREA' AS seccion,
        a.nombre || ' (' || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha)::TEXT || ') -> ' || 
        ROUND(
            CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) > 0
            THEN ((SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) - 
                   SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END)) /
                  SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) * 100)
            ELSE 0 END
        , 1)::TEXT || '%' AS dimension,
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha)::TEXT AS periodo,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS retiros_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS retiros_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_usd,
        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM operaciones o
    JOIN areas a ON a.id = o.area_id
    WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL 
    AND a.nombre != 'Otros Gastos'
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha) IN (2024, 2025)
    GROUP BY a.nombre, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha)
),

-- SECCIÓN 8: TOP 5 CLIENTES POR AÑO
top_clientes AS (
    SELECT seccion, dimension, periodo, ingresos_uyu, ingresos_usd, 
           gastos_uyu, gastos_usd, retiros_uyu, retiros_usd, 
           distribuciones_uyu, distribuciones_usd, cantidad_operaciones
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            '08_TOP_CLIENTES' AS seccion,
            COALESCE(cliente, 'Sin especificar') || ' (' || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha)::TEXT || ')' AS dimension,
            EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha)::TEXT AS periodo,
            COALESCE(SUM(total_pesificado), 0) AS ingresos_uyu,
            COALESCE(SUM(total_dolarizado), 0) AS ingresos_usd,
            0::NUMERIC AS gastos_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS gastos_usd,
            0::NUMERIC AS retiros_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS retiros_usd,
            0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_usd,
            COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) ORDER BY SUM(total_pesificado) DESC) AS rn
        FROM operaciones 
        WHERE deleted_at IS NULL 
        AND tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO'
        AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) IN (2024, 2025)
        AND cliente IS NOT NULL AND cliente != ''
        GROUP BY cliente, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha)
    ) t WHERE rn <= 5
),

-- SECCIÓN 9: TOP 5 PROVEEDORES POR AÑO
top_proveedores AS (
    SELECT seccion, dimension, periodo, ingresos_uyu, ingresos_usd, 
           gastos_uyu, gastos_usd, retiros_uyu, retiros_usd, 
           distribuciones_uyu, distribuciones_usd, cantidad_operaciones
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            '09_TOP_PROVEEDORES' AS seccion,
            COALESCE(proveedor, 'Sin especificar') || ' (' || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha)::TEXT || ')' AS dimension,
            EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha)::TEXT AS periodo,
            0::NUMERIC AS ingresos_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS ingresos_usd,
            COALESCE(SUM(total_pesificado), 0) AS gastos_uyu,
            COALESCE(SUM(total_dolarizado), 0) AS gastos_usd,
            0::NUMERIC AS retiros_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS retiros_usd,
            0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_usd,
            COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) ORDER BY SUM(total_pesificado) DESC) AS rn
        FROM operaciones 
        WHERE deleted_at IS NULL 
        AND tipo_operacion = 'GASTO'
        AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) IN (2024, 2025)
        AND proveedor IS NOT NULL AND proveedor != ''
        GROUP BY proveedor, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha)
    ) t WHERE rn <= 5
)

SELECT 
    a.nombre AS area,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) - 
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS resultado,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) > 0 
        THEN ROUND(((SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) - 
                     SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END)) / 
                    SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END)) * 100, 2)
        ELSE 0 
    END AS rentabilidad_pct
FROM operaciones o
JOIN areas a ON a.id = o.area_id
WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL 
AND a.nombre IN ('Jurídica', 'Contable')
AND DATE_TRUNC('year', o.fecha) = DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY a.nombre
ORDER BY ingresos DESC

pregunta: ¿En qué meses los gastos superaron a los ingresos?
sql_sistema:
WITH datos_mensuales AS (
    SELECT 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) AS anio,
        EXTRACT(MONTH FROM fecha) AS mes,
        SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) AS ingresos,
        SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) AS gastos
    FROM operaciones
    WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
      AND tipo_operacion IN ('INGRESO', 'GASTO')
    GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM fecha)
)
SELECT 
    anio,
    mes,
    ingresos,
    gastos,
    gastos - ingresos AS diferencia
FROM datos_mensuales
WHERE gastos > ingresos
ORDER BY anio DESC, mes DESC

            THEN ROUND(((COALESCE(i25.total_2025, 0) - COALESCE(i24.total_2024, 0)) * 100.0 / i24.total_2024), 2)
            ELSE NULL
        END AS crecimiento_pct
    FROM ingresos_2025 i25
    FULL OUTER JOIN ingresos_2024 i24 ON i25.cliente = i24.cliente
    WHERE COALESCE(i24.total_2024, 0) > 0
)
SELECT cliente, total_2024, total_2025, crecimiento_pct
FROM crecimiento
WHERE crecimiento_pct IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY crecimiento_pct DESC
LIMIT 1

pregunta: Dame un análisis de la tendencia de rentabilidad por trimestre cruzado con localidad
sql_sistema:
WITH datos_trimestrales AS (
    SELECT 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha) AS anio,
        EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM o.fecha) AS trimestre,
        CAST(o.localidad AS TEXT) AS localidad,
        SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) AS ingresos,
        SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) AS gastos
    FROM operaciones o
    WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL
      AND o.tipo_operacion IN ('INGRESO', 'GASTO')
    GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha), EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM o.fecha), o.localidad
),
rentabilidad_calculada AS (
    SELECT 
        anio,
        trimestre,
        localidad,
        ingresos,
        gastos,
        ingresos - gastos AS resultado_neto,
        CASE 
            WHEN ingresos > 0 THEN ROUND((ingresos - gastos) * 100.0 / ingresos, 2)
            ELSE 0 
        END AS rentabilidad_pct
    FROM datos_trimestrales
),
por_localidad AS (
    SELECT 
        0 AS orden,
        anio,
        trimestre,
        localidad,
        ingresos,
        gastos,
        resultado_neto,
        rentabilidad_pct
    FROM rentabilidad_calculada
),
totales_trimestre AS (
    SELECT 
        1 AS orden,
        anio,
        trimestre,
        'TOTAL' AS localidad,
        SUM(ingresos) AS ingresos,
        SUM(gastos) AS gastos,
        SUM(ingresos) - SUM(gastos) AS resultado_neto,
        CASE 
            WHEN SUM(ingresos) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(ingresos) - SUM(gastos)) * 100.0 / SUM(ingresos), 2)
            ELSE 0 
        END AS rentabilidad_pct
    FROM rentabilidad_calculada
    GROUP BY anio, trimestre
)
SELECT 
    anio,
    trimestre,
    localidad,
    ingresos,
    gastos,
    resultado_neto,
    rentabilidad_pct
FROM (
    SELECT * FROM por_localidad 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT * FROM totales_trimestre
) resultado
ORDER BY anio DESC, trimestre DESC, orden, localidad

WITH

-- SECCIÓN 3: POR LOCALIDAD
por_localidad AS (

        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_usd,

-- SECCIÓN 4: POR MES
por_mes AS (

        '2024' AS periodo,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_usd,

-- SECCIÓN 5: RETIROS DE LA EMPRESA (por localidad y moneda)
retiros_empresa AS (

        '2024' AS periodo,
        0::NUMERIC AS ingresos_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS ingresos_usd,

    GROUP BY localidad, moneda_original

-- SECCIÓN 6: DISTRIBUCIONES A SOCIOS
distribuciones_socios AS (
    SELECT 
        '06_DISTRIBUCIONES_SOCIOS' AS seccion,
        s.nombre || ' (' || dd.porcentaje || '%)' AS dimension,
        '2024' AS periodo,
        0::NUMERIC AS ingresos_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS ingresos_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS gastos_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS gastos_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS retiros_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS retiros_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(dd.total_pesificado), 0) AS distribuciones_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(dd.total_dolarizado), 0) AS distribuciones_usd,
        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM distribuciones_detalle dd
    JOIN operaciones o ON o.id = dd.operacion_id
    JOIN socios s ON s.id = dd.socio_id
    WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha) = 2024
    GROUP BY s.nombre, dd.porcentaje
),

-- SECCIÓN 7: RENTABILIDAD POR ÁREA
rentabilidad_area AS (
    SELECT 
        '07_RENTABILIDAD_AREA' AS seccion,
        a.nombre || ' -> ' || 
        ROUND(
            CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) > 0
            THEN ((SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) - 
                   SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END)) /
                  SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) * 100)
            ELSE 0 END
        , 1)::TEXT || '% rentabilidad' AS dimension,
        '2024' AS periodo,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS retiros_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS retiros_usd,

    FROM operaciones o

    WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL 
    AND a.nombre != 'Otros Gastos'
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha) = 2024
    GROUP BY a.nombre
),

-- SECCIÓN 8: TOP 10 CLIENTES
top_clientes AS (

        THEN ROUND(((SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) - 
                     SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END)) / 
                    SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END)) * 100, 2)
        ELSE 0 
    END AS rentabilidad_pct
FROM operaciones o
JOIN areas a ON a.id = o.area_id
WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL 
AND a.nombre NOT IN ('Otros Gastos')
AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha) = 2024
GROUP BY a.nombre
ORDER BY rentabilidad_pct DESC

            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) ORDER BY SUM(total_pesificado) DESC) AS rn

WITH

totales AS (

        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM operaciones

),

-- SECCIÓN 2: POR ÁREA
por_area AS (
    SELECT 
        '02_POR_AREA' AS seccion,
        a.nombre AS dimension,
        '2024' AS periodo,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS retiros_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS retiros_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_usd,
        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM operaciones o
    JOIN areas a ON a.id = o.area_id
    WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha) = 2024
    GROUP BY a.nombre
),

-- SECCIÓN 3: POR LOCALIDAD
por_localidad AS (
    SELECT 
        '03_POR_LOCALIDAD' AS seccion,
        localidad::TEXT AS dimension,
        '2024' AS periodo,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'RETIRO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS retiros_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'RETIRO' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS retiros_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_usd,
        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM operaciones 
    WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) = 2024
    GROUP BY localidad
),

-- SECCIÓN 4: POR MES
por_mes AS (
    SELECT 
        '04_POR_MES' AS seccion,
        TO_CHAR(fecha, 'MM-Mon') AS dimension,
        '2024' AS periodo,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'RETIRO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS retiros_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'RETIRO' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS retiros_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'DISTRIBUCION' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS distribuciones_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'DISTRIBUCION' THEN total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS distribuciones_usd,
        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM operaciones 
    WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) = 2024
    GROUP BY TO_CHAR(fecha, 'MM-Mon')
),

-- SECCIÓN 5: RETIROS DE LA EMPRESA (por localidad y moneda)
retiros_empresa AS (
    SELECT 
        '05_RETIROS_EMPRESA' AS seccion,
        localidad::TEXT || ' - ' || moneda_original::TEXT AS dimension,
        '2024' AS periodo,
        0::NUMERIC AS ingresos_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS ingresos_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS gastos_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS gastos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(total_pesificado), 0) AS retiros_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(total_dolarizado), 0) AS retiros_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_usd,
        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM operaciones 
    WHERE deleted_at IS NULL 
    AND tipo_operacion = 'RETIRO'
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) = 2024
    GROUP BY localidad, moneda_original
),

-- SECCIÓN 6: DISTRIBUCIONES A SOCIOS
distribuciones_socios AS (
    SELECT 
        '06_DISTRIBUCIONES_SOCIOS' AS seccion,
        s.nombre || ' (' || dd.porcentaje || '%)' AS dimension,
        '2024' AS periodo,
        0::NUMERIC AS ingresos_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS ingresos_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS gastos_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS gastos_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS retiros_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS retiros_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(dd.total_pesificado), 0) AS distribuciones_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(dd.total_dolarizado), 0) AS distribuciones_usd,
        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM distribuciones_detalle dd
    JOIN operaciones o ON o.id = dd.operacion_id
    JOIN socios s ON s.id = dd.socio_id
    WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha) = 2024
    GROUP BY s.nombre, dd.porcentaje
),

-- SECCIÓN 7: RENTABILIDAD POR ÁREA
rentabilidad_area AS (
    SELECT 
        '07_RENTABILIDAD_AREA' AS seccion,
        a.nombre || ' -> ' || 
        ROUND(
            CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) > 0
            THEN ((SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) - 
                   SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END)) /
                  SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) * 100)
            ELSE 0 END
        , 1)::TEXT || '% rentabilidad' AS dimension,
        '2024' AS periodo,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ingresos_usd,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_uyu,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_dolarizado ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gastos_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS retiros_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS retiros_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_usd,
        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM operaciones o
    JOIN areas a ON a.id = o.area_id
    WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL 
    AND a.nombre != 'Otros Gastos'
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha) = 2024
    GROUP BY a.nombre
),

-- SECCIÓN 8: TOP 10 CLIENTES
top_clientes AS (

        0::NUMERIC AS retiros_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS retiros_usd,
        0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_usd,
        COUNT(*) AS cantidad_operaciones
    FROM operaciones

    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) = 2024
    AND cliente IS NOT NULL AND cliente != ''
    GROUP BY cliente
    ORDER BY SUM(total_pesificado) DESC
    LIMIT 10

-- SECCIÓN 9: TOP 10 PROVEEDORES
top_proveedores AS (
    SELECT 
        '09_TOP_PROVEEDORES' AS seccion,
        COALESCE(proveedor, 'Sin especificar') AS dimension,

        0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_uyu, 0::NUMERIC AS distribuciones_usd,

    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) = 2024

pregunta: ¿Qué área tuvo el mayor crecimiento interanual de ingresos?
sql_sistema:
WITH ingresos_por_area_anio AS (
    SELECT 
        a.nombre AS area,
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha) AS anio,
        SUM(o.total_pesificado) AS total_ingresos
    FROM operaciones o
    INNER JOIN areas a ON o.area_id = a.id
    WHERE o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO'
      AND o.deleted_at IS NULL
      AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha) IN (2025, 2026)
    GROUP BY a.nombre, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha)
),
crecimiento AS (
    SELECT 
        area,
        SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN total_ingresos ELSE 0 END) AS ingresos_2025,
        SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2026 THEN total_ingresos ELSE 0 END) AS ingresos_2026,
        SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2026 THEN total_ingresos ELSE 0 END) - 
        SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN total_ingresos ELSE 0 END) AS crecimiento_absoluto,
        CASE 
            WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN total_ingresos ELSE 0 END) > 0 
            THEN ROUND(
                (SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2026 THEN total_ingresos ELSE 0 END) - 
                 SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN total_ingresos ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 / 
                SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN total_ingresos ELSE 0 END), 2)
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS crecimiento_porcentual
    FROM ingresos_por_area_anio
    GROUP BY area
    HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN anio = 2025 THEN total_ingresos ELSE 0 END) > 0
)
SELECT area, ingresos_2025, ingresos_2026, crecimiento_absoluto, crecimiento_porcentual
FROM crecimiento
ORDER BY crecimiento_absoluto DESC

sql_sistema:
WITH gastos_por_proveedor AS (
    SELECT 
        COALESCE(proveedor, 'Sin proveedor') AS proveedor,
        SUM(total_pesificado) AS total_gastos
    FROM operaciones
    WHERE tipo_operacion = 'GASTO'
      AND deleted_at IS NULL
      AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) = 2025
    GROUP BY proveedor
),
gastos_ordenados AS (
    SELECT 
        proveedor,
        total_gastos,
        SUM(total_gastos) OVER () AS total_general,
        SUM(total_gastos) OVER (ORDER BY total_gastos DESC ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS acumulado
    FROM gastos_por_proveedor
),
con_porcentaje AS (
    SELECT 
        proveedor,
        total_gastos,
        acumulado,
        ROUND(acumulado * 100.0 / total_general, 2) AS porcentaje_acumulado,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total_gastos DESC) AS posicion
    FROM gastos_ordenados
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS proveedores_80_pct
FROM con_porcentaje
WHERE posicion <= (
    SELECT MIN(posicion)
    FROM con_porcentaje
    WHERE porcentaje_acumulado >= 80
)

pregunta: Ranking de socios por rentabilidad de las áreas que manejan
sql_sistema:
WITH rentabilidad_areas AS (
    SELECT 
        a.nombre AS area,
        SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) AS ingresos,
        SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) AS gastos,
        CASE 
            WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) > 0 
            THEN (SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) - 
                  SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 / 
                 SUM(CASE WHEN o.tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN o.total_pesificado ELSE 0 END)
            ELSE 0 
        END AS rentabilidad_pct
    FROM operaciones o
    INNER JOIN areas a ON o.area_id = a.id
    WHERE o.tipo_operacion IN ('INGRESO', 'GASTO')
      AND o.deleted_at IS NULL
      AND a.nombre != 'Otros Gastos'
      AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY a.nombre
),
socios_areas AS (
    SELECT 
        s.nombre AS socio,
        AVG(ra.rentabilidad_pct) AS rentabilidad_promedio,
        COUNT(ra.area) AS areas_manejadas,
        STRING_AGG(ra.area, ', ' ORDER BY ra.rentabilidad_pct DESC) AS areas
    FROM socios s
    CROSS JOIN rentabilidad_areas ra
    GROUP BY s.nombre
)
SELECT 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY rentabilidad_promedio DESC) AS ranking,
    socio,
    ROUND(rentabilidad_promedio, 2) AS rentabilidad_pct,
    areas_manejadas,
    areas
FROM socios_areas
ORDER BY rentabilidad_promedio DESC

pregunta: ¿En qué trimestre fue más eficiente la relación ingresos/gastos en 2025?
sql_sistema:
WITH trimestres AS (
    SELECT
        CASE 
            WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM fecha) BETWEEN 1 AND 3 THEN 1
            WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM fecha) BETWEEN 4 AND 6 THEN 2
            WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM fecha) BETWEEN 7 AND 9 THEN 3
            ELSE 4
        END AS trimestre,
        SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) AS ingresos,
        SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) AS gastos
    FROM operaciones
    WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
      AND tipo_operacion IN ('INGRESO', 'GASTO')
      AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) = 2025
    GROUP BY CASE 
        WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM fecha) BETWEEN 1 AND 3 THEN 1
        WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM fecha) BETWEEN 4 AND 6 THEN 2
        WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM fecha) BETWEEN 7 AND 9 THEN 3
        ELSE 4
    END
)
SELECT 
    trimestre,
    ingresos,
    gastos,
    CASE WHEN gastos > 0 THEN ROUND(ingresos / gastos, 2) ELSE NULL END AS ratio_ingresos_gastos,
    CASE WHEN ingresos > 0 THEN ROUND((ingresos - gastos) * 100.0 / ingresos, 2) ELSE 0 END AS rentabilidad_pct
FROM trimestres
WHERE ingresos > 0 OR gastos > 0
ORDER BY ratio_ingresos_gastos DESC NULLS LAST

pregunta: ¿Cuál es la correlación entre retiros y resultado neto mensual?
sql_sistema:
WITH datos_mensuales AS (
    SELECT 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha) AS anio,
        EXTRACT(MONTH FROM fecha) AS mes,
        SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) -
        SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) AS resultado_neto,
        SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'RETIRO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) AS retiros
    FROM operaciones
    WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
    GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM fecha), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM fecha)
    HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'INGRESO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) -
           SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'GASTO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) IS NOT NULL
       AND SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_operacion = 'RETIRO' THEN total_pesificado ELSE 0 END) IS NOT NULL
),
estadisticas AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS n,
        AVG(resultado_neto) AS media_resultado,
        AVG(retiros) AS media_retiros,
        SUM((resultado_neto - AVG(resultado_neto) OVER()) * (retiros - AVG(retiros) OVER())) AS suma_productos,
        SQRT(SUM(POWER(resultado_neto - AVG(resultado_neto) OVER(), 2))) AS desv_resultado,
        SQRT(SUM(POWER(retiros - AVG(retiros) OVER(), 2))) AS desv_retiros
    FROM datos_mensuales
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CASE 
            WHEN desv_resultado * desv_retiros > 0 
            THEN suma_productos / (desv_resultado * desv_retiros)
            ELSE 0 
        END, 4
    ) AS correlacion_pearson,
    n AS meses_analizados,
    ROUND(media_resultado, 2) AS resultado_neto_promedio,
    ROUND(media_retiros, 2) AS retiros_promedio
FROM estadisticas

pregunta: ¿Cuál es la proporción de gastos fijos vs variables por localidad?
sql_sistema:
WITH gastos_por_localidad AS (
    SELECT 
        CAST(o.localidad AS TEXT) AS localidad,
        a.nombre AS area,
        SUM(o.total_pesificado) AS total_gastos
    FROM operaciones o
    INNER JOIN areas a ON o.area_id = a.id
    WHERE o.tipo_operacion = 'GASTO'
      AND o.deleted_at IS NULL
      AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.fecha) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY o.localidad, a.nombre
),
clasificacion AS (
    SELECT 
        localidad,
        SUM(CASE WHEN area IN ('Administración', 'Otros Gastos') THEN total_gastos ELSE 0 END) AS gastos_fijos,
        SUM(CASE WHEN area IN ('Jurídica', 'Notarial', 'Contable', 'Recuperación') THEN total_gastos ELSE 0 END) AS gastos_variables,
        SUM(total_gastos) AS total_gastos
    FROM gastos_por_localidad
    GROUP BY localidad
),
detalle AS (
    SELECT 
        0 AS orden,
        localidad,
        gastos_fijos,
        gastos_variables,
        total_gastos,
        CASE WHEN total_gastos > 0 THEN ROUND(gastos_fijos * 100.0 / total_gastos, 2) ELSE 0 END AS pct_fijos,
        CASE WHEN total_gastos > 0 THEN ROUND(gastos_variables * 100.0 / total_gastos, 2) ELSE 0 END AS pct_variables
    FROM clasificacion
),
total_general AS (
    SELECT 
        1 AS orden,
        'TOTAL GENERAL' AS localidad,
        SUM(gastos_fijos) AS gastos_fijos,
        SUM(gastos_variables) AS gastos_variables,
        SUM(total_gastos) AS total_gastos,
        CASE WHEN SUM(total_gastos) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(gastos_fijos) * 100.0 / SUM(total_gastos), 2) ELSE 0 END AS pct_fijos,
        CASE WHEN SUM(total_gastos) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(gastos_variables) * 100.0 / SUM(total_gastos), 2) ELSE 0 END AS pct_variables
    FROM clasificacion
)
SELECT localidad, gastos_fijos, gastos_variables, total_gastos, pct_fijos, pct_variables
FROM (
    SELECT * FROM detalle
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM total_general
) resultado
ORDER BY orden, localidad
